zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stanley於1439年4月出生在英國藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可時，他的父親Thomas Stanley33歲，母親Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley37歲。他於大約1451年與Lady Elizabeth Weaver在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1508年11月22日在威爾士丹比爾霍爾特享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特諾特登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stanley于1439年4月出生在英国藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可时，他的父亲Thomas Stanley33岁，母亲Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley37岁。他于大约1451年与Lady Elizabeth Weaver在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1508年11月22日在威尔士丹比爾霍爾特享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特諾特登。

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stanley was born in April 1439, in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas Stanley, was 33 and his mother, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, was 37. He married Lady Elizabeth Weaver about 1451, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 November 1508, in Holt, Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 69, and was buried in Northenden, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stanley est né en avril 1439, à Ormskirk, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Stanley, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Weaver environ 1451, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 novembre 1508, à Holt, Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Northenden, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stanley im April 1439 in Ormskirk, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Stanley 33 und seine Mutter Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley 37. Er hat um 1451 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Weaver geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. November 1508 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Holt, Denbighshire, Wales und wurde in Northenden, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanley è nato il nel aprile 1439 nel Ormskirk, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Stanley, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Weaver circa 1451, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 novembre 1508, nel Holt, Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Northenden, Greater Manchester, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stanleyが1439年4月にイギリスランカシュアイアオルムスキルクで生まれた時，父Thomas Stanleyは33歳，母Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanleyは37歳であった。約1451年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでLady Elizabeth Weaverと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1508年11月22日にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアホルトで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターノースエンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stanley(이)가 1439년 4월 영국 랭카실르 오스커크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Stanley(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1451년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Lady Elizabeth Weaver(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1508년 11월 22일 웨일스 덴비그h실르 홀트에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 노르테든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stanley nasceu em abril de 1439, em Ormskirk, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Stanley, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Weaver aproximadamente 1451, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de novembro de 1508, em Holt, Denbighshire, Gales, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Northenden, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stanley родился апрель 1439 г. в местности ормскирк, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Stanley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan De Goushill Baroness Stanley, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Weaver около 1451 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 ноября 1508 г. в местности холт, денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности нортенден, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Weaver aproximadamente 1451, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de noviembre de 1508, en Holt, Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Northenden, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
